title: FW26 Household & Seasonal Buying Notes — Ashley Rogers, Brace Street

korean_designers_premium_positioning: Plumbing & Drain (high, Ashley): 1948 bungalow has cast iron pipes — rubber-seal compression fittings only, no press-fit
Weatherstripping & Insulation (high, Ashley): front door and kitchen window need new weatherstrip before November
Church Supplies (high, Ashley): communion cups (box of 500), pillar candles (white, 6-inch), bulletin folders before December anniversary
Food Bank Packing Supplies (high, Ashley): Harvest Table fundraiser Oct 24 — medium boxes (24-pack), packing tape, vinyl gloves (L), Sharpies
Household Electronics (medium, Dorothy): check with Denise before ordering anything tech-related
Grocery & Pantry Staples (medium, Dorothy): Luzianne tea, Cream of Wheat, Carnation evaporated milk — no substitutions
Health & Pharmacy (high, Ashley): lisinopril refill reminder, 5-day buffer; stock ibuprofen (200-count)
Hardware & Tools (low, Ashley): Ace Hardware on Grand River preferred over Amazon for same-day needs
Clothing & Seasonal Apparel (medium, Ashley): thermal undershirts (L) and wool socks for the daily 6:30 AM walk
Delivery Preferences (high, Ashley): standard delivery only, Tuesday through Friday, avoid Saturday
Pricing Limits (high, Dorothy): no item over $100 without discussing with Dorothy; over $250 needs her sign-off
Gift Buying — Family (medium, Ashley): Dorothy's birthday dinner Jan 12 2027 — coordinate gift with Marcus, Denise, Terri
Yard & Exterior (medium, Ashley): de-icer (calcium chloride, 20-lb) and rock salt before December for the Brace St. walkway
Reading & Faith (low, Ashley): reorder Louis L'Amour — The Lonesome Gods, Bendigo Shafter; new Bible concordance
Chess & Games (low, Ashley): replacement chess clock for Tue/Thu sessions at Brightmoor Community Center
